## What this changes

One-paragraph summary of the change.

## Why

Link the issue this fixes, or describe the motivation if there's no issue.

Fixes #

## How

Notes the reviewer needs in order to evaluate the change. Tricky bits,
trade-offs you considered, things you deliberately didn't do.

## Tests

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `python local_test.py` passes locally
- [ ] New behaviour has tests; bug fixes have a regression test

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows Conventional Commits (`feat(scope): ...`, `fix(scope): ...`, etc.)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
